zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Galeran Valeran de Beaumont于1104年11月24日出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利波蒙特时，他的父亲Robert Beaumont57岁，母亲Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois23岁。他于1136年3月与Mathilde de Blois结婚。他于1136年登记服兵役。他去世于1166年4月9日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延普雷奧享年61岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Galeran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish:
habitational name from Galera, the name of several places in Spain.
variant of   Galea   ‘galleon, (war)ship’.

variants.name: Galea
meanings: modern Hebrew name, meaning ‘wave’.

nameMeanings.name: Valeran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Julio, Luis, Ramon, Carlos, Manuel, Marina, Pablo, Alberto, Alejandro, Alonso.  Italian Lorenzo, Antonio, Elio, Giraldo, Angelo, Caesar, Ciro, Clemente, Heriberto, Ireneo, Silvano, Tarcisio.
Spanish: habitational name from Valera in Cuenca province and possibly also from a place with the same name in Badajoz.
Italian (mainly Lombardy): habitational name from any of the places called Valera, for example Valera Fratta in Lodi province.

variants.name: Valerio
meanings: From the French form of the Latin name Valeria, feminine of Valerius, an old Roman family name apparently derived from valere ‘to be healthy, strong’. The name owes its popularity as a male name in France to the cult of a 3rd-century saint who was converted to Christianity by Martial of Limoges. The masculine form Valery is found occasionally in England in the 16th century, but by the 17th century had fallen into disuse.

en.lifeSummary: When Galeran Valeran de Beaumont was born on 24 November 1104, in Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Robert Beaumont, was 57 and his mother, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, was 23. He married Mathilde de Blois in March 1136. He registered for military service in 1136. He died on 9 April 1166, in Préaux, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Galeran Valeran de Beaumont est né le 24 novembre 1104, à Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Robert Beaumont, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde de Blois en mars 1136. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1136. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1166, à Préaux, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Galeran Valeran de Beaumont am 24. November 1104 in Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Beaumont 57 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois 23. Er hat im März 1136 Mathilde de Blois geheiratet. Er hat sich 1136 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. April 1166 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Préaux, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Galeran Valeran de Beaumont è nato il il 24 novembre 1104 nel Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert Beaumont, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde de Blois nel marzo 1136. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1136. Morì il 9 aprile 1166, nel Préaux, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Galeran Valeran de Beaumontが1104年11月24日にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメビーウモントで生まれた時，父Robert Beaumontは57歳，母Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandoisは23歳であった。1136年3月にMathilde de Bloisと結婚した。彼は1136年に兵役登録をした。彼は1166年4月9日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンプルeアウックスで61歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Galeran Valeran de Beaumont(이)가 1104년 11월 24일 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 보몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Beaumont(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1136년 3월 Mathilde de Blois(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1136년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1166년 4월 9일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 플e오스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Galeran Valeran de Beaumont nasceu em 24 de novembro de 1104, em Beaumont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert Beaumont, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde de Blois em março de 1136. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1136. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1166, em Préaux, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Normandie, França.

ru.Préaux, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Franc: прeаукс, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Galeran Valeran de Beaumont родился 24 ноября 1104 г. в местности бомонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert Beaumont было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Blois марта 1136 г. В 1136 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 апреля 1166 г. в местности прeаукс, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности норманди, Франция.

Se casó con Mathilde de Blois en marzo de 1136. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1136. Murió el 9 de abril de 1166, en Préaux, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Normandie, Francia.
